topStories.title: Former counter-terrorism head investigated by FBI over alleged leaks
topStories.description: The former counter-terrorism head resigned on Tuesday over the war with Iran, saying the country posed "no imminent threat" to the US.

topStories.title: Nine-judge Supreme Court Bench reserves verdict on ambit of ‘industry’
topStories.description: The 1978 judgment expanded the ambit of ‘industry’ to hold that any systematic activity including charitable and government-run services, were an industry if they met the ‘triple test’ parameters

topStories.title: He served 5 years as MLA… then was asked to repay ₹21 lakh
topStories.description: In our previous episode, we explored the remarkable story of a father and son — P. H. Pandian and Manoj Pandian — who lost elections but successfully challenged the election of the winning candidtes in the Supreme Court. In this epside, we continue that story.

topStories.title: Higher-Dose Wegovy Gets US Nod, Trials Show Over 20% Average Weight Loss
topStories.description: Novo Nordisk said it plans to launch the new formulation, (semaglutide 7.2 mg), in the United States in April 2026.

topStories.title: Assam Assembly elections 2026: Pradyut factor in Congress’s third list of candidates
topStories.description: MLA Basanta Das, denied a ticket by the BJP, gets an Asom Gana Parishad ticket nine hours after switching over

topStories.title: US F-35 Hit By Suspected Iranian Fire, Makes Emergency Landing: Report
topStories.description: If confirmed, the episode would mark the first instance of Iran striking a US aircraft since the conflict began in February. The F-35, one of the most advanced fighter jets in service, carries a price...

dailyNews.description: Ministry of External Affairs says the Ukrainians and an American were found “wanting” of the required permits for visiting Mizoram

dailyNews.title: Chhattisgarh Assembly passes new anti-conversion Bill with stricter provisions
dailyNews.description: The Bill mandates life imprisonment and fines up to ₹25 lakh in specific cases; Congress MLAs raise objections, call for broader consultations, and seek the handing over of the Bill to a ‘Select Committee’

dailyNews.description: The sharp exchange comes amid heightened tensions following Israeli airstrikes on Iran's South Pars gas field-the world's largest natural gas reserve.

dailyNews.title: Assembly elections 2026 LIVE: BJP using ECI as weapon to win Bengal polls, says Kejriwal, supporting Mamata
dailyNews.description: Continuing with her tirade against the Election Commission, the Trinamool Congress supremo claimed that such action amounted to "systematic politicisation of institutions" and a "direct assault on the Constitution"

dailyNews.title: Missing former college student, 19, found dead in pond two months after vanishing near his apartment
dailyNews.description: The body of Chance Lauer, a missing 19-year-old former college student, was recovered from a pond near his Maine apartment complex, police said Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: 4 House Dems vote against Women's History Museum bill over biological women-only amendment, Republican claims

topStories.description: Podcast host Jennifer Welch criticized Trump and the GOP over military support, raising concerns about U.S. troops and potential escalation with Iran.

topStories.title: Slotkin presses DHS pick on ICE at polls, says she can’t trust Trump to allow ‘free and fair’ election
topStories.description: Sen. Slotkin challenges Trump's DHS pick Mullin over ICE at polling places during confirmation hearing, warning Trump could try to "steal" the 2026 election.

dailyNews.title: ‘Go Big and Go Loud’: Inside the Justice Dept.’s Push to Prosecute Protesters
dailyNews.description: Prosecutors have struggled to prove in court what the president and his aides have repeatedly said in public: that a network of leftist activists presents a serious threat to national security.

dailyNews.title: Trump Jokes About Pearl Harbor in Meeting With Japan’s Leader
dailyNews.description: Breaking a taboo, President Trump needled Japan’s prime minister about the World War II attack, as she widened her eyes and appeared to take a deep breath in the Oval Office.

dailyNews.title: Lawsuit Accuses Justice Dept. Leadership of ‘Political Retribution’
dailyNews.description: The suit filed by two fired F.B.I. agents aimed to hold the Trump administration accountable for the purge of personnel who had worked on the investigations of Mr. Trump or his allies.

dailyNews.title: A Gift From Trump to the Supreme Court
dailyNews.description: In a caustic critique of the court issued on social media late Sunday night, the president inadvertently buttressed its independence.

dailyNews.title: Iran War Narrows Fed’s Path to Rate Cuts as Trump Demands Immediate Relief
dailyNews.description: Jerome H. Powell, the Fed chair, wants to keep the central bank’s policy options open as officials stare down another economic shock that threatens to stoke inflation and crimp growth.

dailyNews.title: Ex-FBI agents who worked on Trump 2020 election probe sue over firings
dailyNews.description: Two former FBI agents who helped investigate President Trump's efforts to overturn the 2020 presidential election results sued the federal government, alleging they were wrongfully terminated.

dailyNews.title: Trump meets with Japanese prime minister after urging nation to help police Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump met Thursday with Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi at the White House as he continued his push for U.S. allies to help secure the Strait of Hormuz amid the Iran war. CBS News White House reporter Olivia Rinaldi has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump says "I'm not putting troops" in Iran during meeting with Japan's prime minister
dailyNews.description: President Trump took questions from the Oval Office during a meeting with Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi and said he was not thinking of putting troops in Iran. CBS News' Eleanor Watson breaks down Mr. Trump's latest comments.

dailyNews.title: Trump signals DOJ should continue Powell probe, complicating Warsh Fed nom
dailyNews.description: Powell has accused the DOJ of investigating him in retaliation for his refusal to lower interest rates as much or as quickly as Trump has demanded.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth says potential $200 billion Iran war spending request could shift: 'Takes money to kill bad guys'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's National Economic Council director, Kevin Hassett, said Sunday that the war has already cost $12 billion.

dailyNews.title: Trump's DHS pick Markwayne Mullin advances out of Senate committee after tough confirmation hearing
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump tapped Sen. Markwayne Mullin, R-Okla., earlier this month to replace Kristi Noem.

dailyNews.title: Trump makes a Pearl Harbor joke while meeting with the Japanese prime minister
dailyNews.description: When asked by a reporter about why the U.S. didn't share their Iran war plans with Japan, President Donald Trump said it was necessary for the element of surprise. The president followed this with a joke, saying, "Who knows better about surprise than Japan? Ok, why didn’t you tell me about Pearl Harbor?"
